product: Genie Spaces is now Genie Agents ​
tagline: July 8, 2026 Genie Spaces are now called Genie Agents.
what_it_does: July 8, 2026 Genie Spaces are now called Genie Agents. The name changed across the documentation, but the product's capabilities are unchanged.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
